# Devlog

## Wikiwiki installed

Installed Thjodann/Wikiwiki into PRISM, initialized the Wikiwiki config and record store, added npm scripts, and rendered the initial Markdown wiki plus static wiki site.

Files: `package.json`, `.wikiwiki/config.json`, `wiki/index.md`, `wiki-site/index.html`

Recorded: 2026-07-04T23:58:03.465Z | Record: `event_fd2fe77b-bba7-4ed3-af0d-afc361ccab12` | Confidence: high

## Wiki site restyled with PRISM visual language

Reworked .wikiwiki/site-theme.json to use PRISM app CSS cues: dark-by-default warm shell, cream text, refracted spectrum accents, conic brand mark, radial hero glows, glassy cards, large radii, and a warm neutral light fallback.

Files: `.wikiwiki/site-theme.json`, `apps/web/src/app/prism/page.module.css`, `apps/web/src/app/page.module.css`, `wiki-site/assets/project-theme.css`

Recorded: 2026-07-05T00:40:28.067Z | Record: `event_752b90fc-e23c-4000-afe3-fbb07affebba` | Confidence: high
